name: Suitefish CMS
description: A full content management system built from scratch. Modular, self-hosted and battle-tested — the backbone of many Bugfish web projects.

name: Bind9 Web Manager
description: All-in-one DNS solution for effortless management, replication and user administration. Ships as a ready-to-run container.

name: Proxmox VMA2RAW
description: Convert Proxmox VMA backup files to raw disk images mountable on Windows and Linux — no Proxmox host required.

name: Floor Plan Designer
description: Draw and edit floor plans directly in the browser. Pure JavaScript, no backend, no accounts — open it and start planning.

name: Hash Cracker
description: Windows tool to recover lost password hashes with dictionary and brute-force modes. Fast, small and dependency-free.
